title: Sodium No Alerts
description: A mod to disable Sodium warnings for PojavLauncher.
body:
This simple Mod will disable Sodium's warning pop-ups for PojavLauncher users. If you are not one of these users, you will not need this mod at all.

**Note: This mod depends on [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium). You must install Sodium before installing this mod!**
